section.title: Purpose of This Article
section.para: This article maps the LLM-database theory developed in the primary article () to the specific matters, theories, and evidence already present in the metavacua/legal-theory repository. It serves two functions: first, to show that the database theory is not a standalone novelty but coheres with and reinforces existing arguments in the corpus; second, to identify findings of fact that the primary article supports and that should be incorporated into the relevant matters' findings documents.
